title: Garfield Killer Queen (JCraft: EOE)
description: Replaces KQ (& BTD) skin1 with Garfield (JOJO, JJBA)
body:
Replaces KQ (& BTD) skin1 with Garfield

Seen in games like A Universal Time. My friend also wanted me to make him a custom kq skin and it resembles Garfield a lot so I already had a pretty good start.

Changes the apparence of your JoJo stand

Type "Subsetg4ming" in your search bar to find everything by me!
